description: This file contains SCSS mixins related to gradient backgrounds, including linear and radial gradients, as well as directional and striped gradients. It defines reusable style snippets for applying gradient backgrounds with customizable colors and directions.

methods.name: gradient-bg
methods.description: Applies a background color and optionally a gradient background if enabled.

methods.name: gradient-x
methods.description: Creates a horizontal linear gradient from left to right with specified start and end colors and positions.

methods.name: gradient-y
methods.description: Creates a vertical linear gradient from top to bottom with specified start and end colors and positions.

methods.name: gradient-directional
methods.description: Creates a linear gradient at a specified angle with start and end colors.

methods.name: gradient-x-three-colors
methods.description: Creates a horizontal linear gradient with three colors: start, middle, and end.

methods.name: gradient-y-three-colors
methods.description: Creates a vertical linear gradient with three colors: start, middle, and end.

methods.name: gradient-radial
methods.description: Creates a radial gradient with inner and outer colors.

methods.name: gradient-striped
methods.description: Creates a striped linear gradient at a specified angle with transparent and colored stripes.
